title: Myrcia circulensis
taxonomy: Myrcia circulensis is classified within the family Myrtaceae, which is a large family of flowering plants commonly known as the myrtle family. This family is part of the order Myrtales and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The genus Myrcia is a large and diverse group of plants, with over 1,000 species found in the Americas, Africa, and Asia. Myrcia circulensis is a species within this genus and is likely to share similar characteristics with other species in the family. Further research would be necessary to determine the specific classification of Myrcia circulensis.
